description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and angular contours. The stock is robust and fixed, providing stability for accurate shooting, while the pistol grip and foregrip offer ergonomic handling. The barrel is long and slender, extending from a ventilated handguard, and the magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger. The rifle includes a simple iron sight system mounted on top, with no visible optics or advanced sighting devices. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, long barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and handguard, with the muzzle and front sight visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the magazine and trigger area visible.
